overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an astronaut character navigating through an asteroid field in space using a jetpack. The character ascends from near a large white planetary body before continuing through denser asteroid clusters, with the camera following from behind.

events.description: character activates jetpack thrusters, emitting white propulsion plume
camera angle shifts from top-down to rear view as character leaves planetary vicinity

agents.ego_description: astronaut character using jetpack to slowly ascend through asteroid field near a large white planet

entered.detail: large pale spherical celestial body occupying lower right corner of frame
field of gray rocky debris floating in space around the character
cluster of smaller asteroids drifting in the left portion of the field

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of an astronaut ascending through a sparse asteroid field. A large white planetary body dominates the lower right corner while the character uses intermittent jetpack bursts to navigate upward through floating rocks and debris.

events.description: lighting shifts as character moves away from planetary reflection into deeper space shadows

agents.ego_description: character continues navigating through denser asteroid clusters with occasional thruster adjustments

entered.detail: prominent rocky formation appearing on left side as camera angle shifts
scattered debris field visible in the deep background

segments.scene_description: The camera shifts to a rear-facing perspective as the character leaves the planetary body behind, entering a denser region of the asteroid field. Large rocky clusters now dominate the left side of the frame while the character continues drifting forward through the debris.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an astronaut ascends from the proximity of a massive planet into the heart of a dense asteroid field. It begins with the character using intermittent jetpack bursts to navigate upward through sparse floating rocks, with a large white planetary body dominating the lower right corner. As the astronaut gains altitude, the camera shifts to a rear-facing perspective, leaving the planetary surface behind. The scene then expands into a more crowded region of space where large rocky clusters dominate the left side of the frame. Finally, the character continues drifting forward, deeper into the thick debris of the asteroid field.
